auth.subtitle: Smart Agri Engine
auth.description: Modern agricultural digital engine based on deep learning and multi-dimensional sensor networks, providing you with a 24/7, high-precision farm twin management experience.
auth.loginDesc: Enter your credentials to access the system
auth.registerDesc: Create your digital agriculture management account
auth.errorNetwork: Network error, please check terminal connection

desc.plots: List of crop growth and soil conditions
desc.logs: Automation logs and AI diagnostic records

advice.wind: Current wind speed is high. Please reinforce greenhouses and facilities.
advice.uv: UV index is extremely high. Reduce outdoor work or use protection.
advice.rain: Rain expected today. Please clear drainage ditches.
advice.temp_high: High temperature. Increase irrigation frequency to prevent dehydration.
advice.temp_low: Low temperature. Ensure greenhouse insulation to prevent frost.
advice.default: Climate conditions are favorable. Continue daily management as planned.

warnings.lowNitrogen: Nitrogen level is low ({{value}}mg/kg). Urea supplement recommended.
warnings.lowPhosphorus: Phosphorus level is low ({{value}}mg/kg). Phosphorus fertilizer recommended.
warnings.lowPotassium: Potassium level is low ({{value}}mg/kg). Potassium fertilizer recommended.
warnings.title: {{name}} - {{param}} Warning

empty.title: No Monitoring Data
empty.desc: You haven't added any plots yet. Please go to 'Field Management' to add plots and connect devices to see real-time data.

sidebar.desc: Switch plots to view real-time data for different areas

inactive.title: Monitoring Inactive
inactive.desc: This plot is not connected to real IoT devices. To get real-time data and historical trends, please deploy devices in 'Field Management'.

ai.title: AI Decision Support
ai.subtitle: Planting suggestions based on plot status
ai.analyzingDesc: Performing multi-dimensional inference combining soil moisture, climate trends, and historical yield data. Estimated 3-5 seconds...
ai.comparisonSummary: Recommended {{recommended}} increases average revenue by {{profitInc}} and reduces risk by {{riskDec}} compared to alternatives.
ai.readyDesc: Click 'Smart Recommend' or enter a crop you're interested in, and AI will analyze the best planting strategy for this plot.

hardware.desc: Remote control requires connection to real automated actuators (e.g., valves, fans).
hardware.fertilizationActive: Fertilization task in progress, NPK levels are rising...
hardware.fertilizationInactive: Click the button below to start the auto fertilization system and supplement missing soil nutrients.

soilProbe.name: Multi-layer Soil Probe
soilProbe.desc: Monitor Soil Temp, Hum, pH, NPK

modals.tutorialTitle: Newbie Guide: How to choose devices?
modals.tutorialDesc: To make your farm truly intelligent, you need to select at least one sensor (for data collection) and one automated device (for execution). After selection, the system will exit simulation mode and start receiving real data with AI support.
modals.connectSubtitle: Select IoT hardware to deploy to {{name}}
modals.limitMessage: Your {{plan}} subscription has reached the plot limit. Please upgrade to add more plots.

ai_recognition.title: AI Diagnosis

steps.vision: Zhipu AI vision model identifying features...
steps.deep: Qwen AI performing deep pathology analysis...

plot_steps: Zhipu AI generating planting advice & ROI...

mic_denied.title: Microphone Permission Denied
mic_denied.message: Unable to access microphone. If you are in the preview window, please click 'Open in new tab' at the top right and try again, or allow microphone permission in browser settings.

browser_unsupported.title: Browser Not Supported
browser_unsupported.message: Your browser does not support speech recognition. Please use Chrome or Edge.

quota.title: API Quota Exhausted
quota.desc: The default API quota has been exhausted, or your personal API Key balance is insufficient.
tips: Configure your own Alibaba Cloud and Zhipu AI API Keys in settings
Check if your API Key account balance is sufficient
Contact admin to upgrade your account plan

invalid_key.title: Invalid API Key
invalid_key.desc: The configured API Key may have expired, been disabled, or entered incorrectly.
tips: Check if the API Key in settings is correct
Go to Alibaba Cloud or Zhipu AI console to confirm Key status
Try generating and configuring a new API Key

network.title: Network Connection Error
network.desc: Unable to connect to AI analysis server. Please check your network environment.
tips: Check if your internet connection is normal
If you use a proxy, try closing it or changing nodes
Try again later, the server might be under maintenance

unknown.title: Analysis Process Error
tips: Try refreshing the page and re-uploading image
Ensure image is clear and contains obvious agri features
If the problem persists, contact technical support

labels.title: Identify Crops
labels.desc:
Support drag and drop or click to upload. Clear details recommended.
JPG, PNG format, max 5MB
labels.usage_warning: Public quota is limited. Recommend configuring personal API Key.
labels.usage_action: Configure Personal Key for Unlimited Access
labels.waiting_desc: Upload a photo and select analysis type, AI will provide a detailed diagnosis report
labels.loading_plot_desc: Connecting to sensors and plot database, loading AI decision models...
labels.loading_image_desc: Multi-engine collaborative diagnosis, generating expert report...
labels.profit_desc: Estimated based on market trends and plot capacity
labels.fertilization_desc: Based on real-time nutrient data and growth stage
labels.no_suggestions: No specific suggestions, please refer to the detailed report.
labels.smart_decision_desc_danger: System detected serious {{type}} risk ({{target}}). Recommend immediate intervention based on the report, and check environment alerts for Plot #{{plot}}.
labels.smart_decision_desc_warning: System identified potential warning for {{target}}. Recommend increasing inspection frequency for Plot #{{plot}} and refer to expert report.
labels.smart_decision_desc_success: Plot #{{plot}} {{target}} is currently in good status. Recommend maintaining current automated strategies and regular visual checks.

modals.plot_not_configured_message: This plot is not configured. Please connect devices in 'Field Management' first.

seasonal_tips.spring: Spring plowing, focus on wheat topdressing and fruit tree pruning.
seasonal_tips.summer: Summer harvest and planting, focus on drainage, drought prevention and pests.
seasonal_tips.autumn: Autumn harvest, prepare for grain storage and winter wheat sowing.
seasonal_tips.winter: Winter maintenance, strengthen greenhouse insulation and machinery repair.
seasonal_tips.focus: Large temperature fluctuations, focus on wind and cold protection for facilities.
